data.name: Forbidden Den
data.detailed_description:
Manager by day, heartthrob by night… Help Diego rescue his father while keeping the family business afloat and choosing which girl he'll spend the night with.

Forbidden Den is an exciting blend of nightclub administration and management with a captivating visual novel twist, delivering a fun and sexy story.

Meet Diego, a bright and optimistic young man who has always worked alongside his father in their cozy family tavern. But success attracts unwanted attention. When his father's growing reputation makes powerful enemies, tragedy strikes, shattering their peaceful lives and leaving Diego with a critical choice: fight back or lose everything.

Diego embarks on a thrilling journey to rescue his father and revive their once-thriving business. With the unwavering support of his closest friends and newfound allies, he sets out to transform the humble tavern into the city’s most dazzling nightclub – a paradise of music, great drinks, and spicy encounters.

Between managing the club and navigating his complex relationships, Diego will face challenges far beyond financial setbacks. Every choice he makes will shape his destiny—both in business and in romance.

The features that the game currently has are as follows:

  • Visual novel story progression, with simple decisions, sound effects, and over 200 CGs.

  • Simple Tycoon style gameplay, with income, expenses, random events, maintenance and salary management.

  • Minigames to gain some cash. (1 available for the moment)

  • "Expand the club" feature.

  • Basic furniture and objects to decorate your club!

  • Partial voice acting, SFX at the moment.

  • 5 NSFW Scenes.

  • More than 13 original music tracks.

Our main goal is to continue the main and side stories meanwhile improving the gameplay.

Planned Features:

  • More furniture and services to add to your nightclub.

  • Robust and Deep tycoon simulation.

  • 5 characters to interact with a "complete" storyline each.

  • 4 characters to interact with shorter storylines each.

  • The full main story with "ends" with small changes.

  • Partial voice acting. (mostly SFX)

  • 15 original songs for the game.

  • Add at least 1 more language to the game.

Possible Features: 

  • Full voice acting.

  • The main story branched out into different endings with considerable consequences.

  • More than 20 characters to interact with "complete" storylines each.

  • Different locations/clubs.

  • 20+ original songs.

  • 2 to 3 different languages.

  • Brkn Hvn - Team Leader, Writer, Sound Designer and Music Composer.

  • Aleryberry - Lead Programmer.

  • Kiiroleven - Lead Artist and Designer.

  • Codex_mtu - Background Artist, Artist Assistant.

  • Frank R. Schiele - Visual Artist and Designer.

Especial Thanks:

  • Dialogic Team - Dialogic Plugin

  • Somewattsauce - Characters Concept Art

  • YukiRaven - Laura Voice Actress

  • Reiner - Dominic Voice Actor

  • JD - Studio Logo

data.short_description: Forbidden Den is a game focused on the administration and management of a nightclub with touches of a visual novel that adds a fun and sexy story.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
